reference: I had a porcelain tooth, and it recently fell out while I was eating at a restaurant. I placed it down and lost it. It has been almost two weeks since I have had it. I am waiting for my insurance to be effective, which is on the first of December. This past Sunday, I had a really bad toothache. Now it feels like the pain has moved to my jaw. My jaw looks swollen and is really tender! What can I do?
text: I'm gonna listen to it. I'm gonna listen to it. No, you can't just get a touch, but I don't even know. I don't even know it. Only one thing that I'm not going to see is it?
